subcodes.first_line: Say: O Sovereign of existence, Who art established upon the Throne of Manifestation! I beseech Thee by the Name through which Thou didst reveal Thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا مالک الوجود و المستوی علی عرش الشهود اسئلک بالاسم الذی به تجلیت علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for martyrs, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
